item.title:
ChatGPT's GPT Image 2 is actually incredible.
Full visual breakdown of how to fix my desk setup.
...
item.description:
ChatGPT's GPT Image 2 is actually incredible.
Full visual breakdown of how to fix my desk setup.
I refuse to get rid of my second monitor (I need 3 for live zoom client workshops), but this was the kick I needed to manage cables, swap chairs, buy a cabinet.
cc @sama @gdb wow https://t.co/KBzj7uHndO
--- @alliekmiller | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 50
item.author: @alliekmiller

item.title: All your jobs are belong to us
